description: VERIFIED LIVE: 智联招聘 (Zhaopin) via content-script DOM extraction. Zhaopin's search API is signed, but the rendered results page lists jobs as .joblist-box__item cards — this reads them straight from the DOM of your logged-in Zhaopin search tab. Navigate the tab to a search (zhaopin.com/sou/… or sou.zhaopin.com/?kw=…) and call the tool. Tested live by Claude Code: 20 job cards with salary, company and full card text extracted correctly. Requires being logged into Zhaopin.

tools.name: zhaopin_jobs
tools.description: Job cards on the current 智联招聘 search-results page (navigate the tab to a /sou/ search first). Returns each job's salary, company, and the full card text (job title, skills, city, experience, education — parse from summary). VERIFIED (20 jobs).
